Description: Export your entire Umbraco site structure to YAML — DataTypes, DocumentTypes, Media Types, Templates, Content, Media, Languages, Dictionary Items, Members, and Users. One click in the Settings dashboard produces a portable YAML + media ZIP you can version-control and replay anywhere using the companion Yaml2Schema package. Supports Umbraco 13 only. For Umbraco 14–17, use v2.x.

AuthorDetails.Name: Carlos Casalicchio
AuthorDetails.Description: Developer at SplatDev. Building tools to make Umbraco development faster and more reproducible.

RelatedPackages.Description: Companion package — imports a YAML file and bootstraps your entire Umbraco structure on startup. Supports Umbraco 17.

Screenshots.Caption: Schema Export dashboard — one-click YAML + media ZIP download
